CustomField.description: When non-null, hide the Documents sub-tab from the Delivery Hub workspace ("Delivery") tab. Null = SHOWN (default; safe). Inverted-name field (Hide, not Show) so the safe posture is the default null state, mirroring the LWC1503 inverted-prop convention. Fully reversible — clear the field to show the tab again.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Set to a date/time to hide the Documents tab in the Delivery workspace. Leave blank to show it (default).
CustomField.label: Hide Tab Documents
